page.headline: Pick a time. We'll call.
page.subheadline: Free 30-minute call. No pressure. No commitment. We'll walk through your situation and talk through which programs fit.

calendar.weekendsNote: Weekends are out of the office. Pick a weekday and we'll show available times.
calendar.noTimesAvailable: No times available that day. Try another date.
calendar.errorLoad: Could not load times. Please try again.
calendar.errorBooking: Booking failed. Please try again or call us directly.

quizContext.note: We'll bring this context into the call so you don't have to repeat yourself.

confirmed.headline: You're booked.
confirmed.bodyDefault: Confirmation email on the way. We'll call you at the scheduled time.
confirmed.bodyWithLoTemplate: Confirmation email on the way. {loFirstName} will call you at the scheduled time.
confirmed.reschedule: Need to reschedule? Reply to the confirmation email.

items.question: What should I expect on the call?
items.answer: A 30-minute conversation. We talk through your situation, your goals, what programs might fit. No commitment, no pitch.

items.question: What documents should I have ready?
items.answer: Nothing required for the first call. If you want a soft pre-approval estimate during the call, have your most recent pay stub and a sense of your credit score handy.

items.question: Will this affect my credit score?
items.answer: Not for the call. We do a soft pull only if you ask for a pre-approval estimate, and only with your written consent.

items.question: Can I reschedule?
items.answer: Yes. Reply to the confirmation email or pick a new time on this page.
